text: Standing before this glass wall, I catch my own reflection in the clean surfaces and see a world both inside and out. The exhibition beyond is alive with ideas—"R+D" emblazoned boldly, summoning thoughts of inquiry and transformation. Sunlight and the echo of text on the screens make me feel both curious and at ease, as if I am on the threshold of new understanding. There is a sense of openness and possibility, as if the space itself invites contemplation and the crossing of intellectual frontiers.
